overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through the colorful medieval Renaissance city of Beauclair in Toussaint. The character navigates narrow cobblestone streets, open plazas, and passages with distinctive European architecture under bright sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow cobblestone path beside a stone balustrade wall

entered.detail: tall stone wall with balustrade running along the right side of the path
multi-story stone building with shuttered windows and ivy
arched stone passage leading to open area ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone street flanked by a historic stone townhouse on the left and a tall retaining wall with balustrade on the right. The path leads toward a stone archway in the distance under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with colorful Renaissance buildings

events.description: exits narrow passage through stone archway into open sunlit plaza
turns right to follow the plaza path toward the stairs

agents.ego_description: emerges into the plaza, turns right, and walks past outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople gathered near the fountain in the plaza center

entered.detail: distinctive bright red three-story building with white trim and balconies
decorative stone fountain in the center of the plaza
tables and chairs arranged outside the red building
wide stone staircase leading up to an elevated entrance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage into a bright open plaza, the character turns right and walks past the distinctive red Scarlet Cardinal inn with outdoor seating. Townspeople gather near a central fountain as the path leads toward a stone staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with exterior stairs and hanging vegetation

events.description: begins ascending the gently sloping cobblestone path

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through a narrow passage with stairs visible to the left

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress walking down the narrow passage toward the camera

entered.detail: tall stone staircase with balustrade climbing the building exterior
dense green ivy hanging from overhead balconies and walls
large terracotta pots with plants placed along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow cobblestone passage flanked by red building walls covered in hanging ivy. An exterior stone staircase climbs the left side while potted plants line the right wall. A woman in a dress walks toward the camera from ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorated street with hanging festival banners

events.description: exits narrow alley onto wider street with distinctive red cobblestones

agents.ego_description: walking along the festive street passing under hanging banners

entered.detail: distinctive red-hued cobblestone pavement covering the street
red and gold pennant banners strung across the street overhead
building with green canvas awning over the entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage onto a wider street paved with distinctive red cobblestones, the character walks under festive hanging banners strung between colorful buildings. A green-awning shop is visible on the right as the street opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with central tree and colorful facades

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing a central tree and seated NPCs

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a stone bench beside the blue building

entered.detail: striking blue three-story building with white window frames and decorative gables
large leafy tree growing in the center of the plaza
stone seating along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a pleasant plaza featuring a striking blue historic building on the left and a large central tree providing shade. People sit on stone benches while the red cobblestones continue underfoot, leading toward a stone archway in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to covered stone archway passage

events.description: enters the covered stone archway passage
lighting shifts from bright sun to shadowed interior of the archway

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the dark stone archway tunnel

entered.detail: large stone archway forming a covered tunnel through the building
bright red flowering bushes flanking the archway entrance

segments.scene_description: Approaching a massive stone archway flanked by red flowering bushes, the character walks from the sunlit plaza into the shadowed tunnel passage. The lighting shifts dramatically as the character enters the covered stone corridor at the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched city that transitions from a confined stone corridor into a bustling open plaza and finally up a lush, narrow alleyway. It begins with the character walking along a narrow cobblestone street flanked by a historic townhouse and a high retaining wall, moving steadily toward a distant stone archway. As the character emerges from the passage, the scene opens into a bright plaza where the camera turns right to pass the red Scarlet Cardinal inn and a central fountain crowded with townspeople. The path then shifts toward a stone staircase, leading the character upward into a narrow passage enclosed by red walls draped in hanging ivy. Finally, the camera ascends past potted plants and an exterior stone staircase as a woman in a dress approaches from the opposite direction.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow city street through a sunlit plaza and into a shadowed stone corridor. It begins as the character exits a tight passage onto a wider street of red cobblestones, passing under festive hanging banners and a green-awning shop. As the path opens further, the scene expands into a pleasant plaza featuring a striking blue historic building and a large central tree providing shade for people on stone benches. The camera then follows the red cobblestones toward a massive stone archway flanked by red flowering bushes, moving from the bright open air into the depths of the structure. Finally, the lighting shifts dramatically as the character leaves the sunlight behind to enter a covered stone tunnel.
